patch.value: This chore captures the current continuation release pass rather than reopening earlier closed release work. It records the evidence needed for the current repository HEAD and npm package version 2026.5.23-5.
Production release readiness pass for pm-changelog 2026.5.23-5

Full continuation pass requested on 2026-05-23 to make pm-changelog production and release ready after unreleased repository commits. Scope covers GitHub issues and CI state through gh, dependency/vulnerability checks, strict pm governance, extension version alignment, clean temporary pm install testing, self-generated changelog output, npm publication, GitHub release creation, and final commit/push state.

- GitHub issues, PRs, Actions, releases, vulnerability alerts, and free-feature repository settings are verified with gh.
- npm outdated and npm audit report no actionable dependency or vulnerability findings.
- pm validate strict checks pass after governance updates.
- npm run release:check passes from the repository checkout.
- A clean temporary folder can install the package with pm install from npm or local package source and run pm changelog generate.
- CHANGELOG.md is regenerated by pm-changelog itself and changelog:check passes.
- package version 2026.5.23-5 is committed, pushed, published to npm, tagged, and released publicly on GitHub if all gates pass.

value.author: codex-pm-changelog
value.text: Started from a clean main branch at origin/main; package.json is ahead of the latest published npm dist-tag and needs a current release pass.

value.author: codex
value.text: GitHub evidence: gh issue list shows issues #1, #2, and #3 all closed; gh pr list is empty; gh run list shows latest CI run 26343824903 completed successfully; gh repo view reports PUBLIC visibility, main default branch, Issues enabled, Projects/Wiki disabled, MIT license, README homepage, and release topics. Dependabot alerts endpoint returned [], vulnerability alerts endpoint returned HTTP 204 enabled, and automated-security-fixes reports enabled=true paused=false. Code scanning endpoint reports no analysis found and secret scanning endpoint reports disabled; no paid GitHub security feature was enabled.

value.author: codex
value.text: Dependency evidence: npm update refreshed @types/node lockfile entry to 25.9.1 and @unbrained/pm-cli lockfile entry to 2026.5.18. npm outdated --json returned {}; npm audit --omit=dev --json and npm audit in release:check reported 0 vulnerabilities.

value.author: codex
value.text: Verification evidence: npm run release:check passed for pm-changelog@2026.5.23-5 with tsc --noEmit, 18 node:test tests, npm audit --omit=dev, npm pack --dry-run with 25 files, and changelog:check reporting CHANGELOG.md up to date.

value.author: codex
value.text: Temp install evidence: clean project /tmp/pm-changelog-2026-5-23-5-local-ulnPKD ran pm init, pm install local checkout --project, created and closed a smoke Task, ran pm changelog generate, produced CHANGELOG.md containing Verify local 2026.5.23-5 install, and pm package doctor --project --json --strict-exit returned ok=true with zero warnings.

patch.value: Completed current production-readiness pass for pm-changelog 2026.5.23-5: dependency locks updated, extension runtime version aligned, free Dependabot version-update config added, GitHub issue/CI/security report state verified with gh, npm dependency/audit checks clean, strict pm validation clean, release gate passing, and clean temp local pm install smoke passing.

pm-changelog 2026.5.23-5 is release-ready, governed by strict pm records, installable through pm package flows, self-generates its changelog, and can be published to npm/GitHub after final changelog regeneration.

gh checks found all issues closed, no PRs, latest CI success, empty Dependabot alerts, enabled vulnerability alerts and automated security fixes, and public/free-feature repo settings. npm outdated returned {}, npm audit reported 0 vulnerabilities, npm run release:check passed with 18 tests and pack dry-run, strict pm validate passed, and /tmp/pm-changelog-2026-5-23-5-local-ulnPKD verified pm install plus changelog generation.

Release readiness pass complete; final changelog regeneration, commit, push, npm publish, GitHub release, and post-publish npm-source install verification remain as execution steps against this closed evidence item.
